title: Edward Chinedu Obioha - 280878

 Obioha

 Condition

 25 February 2026
 

 

 Published date:
 16 March 2026
 

 



 


 
Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at time of matters giving rise to outcome

 

 

 Name:
 Edward Leonards Solicitors
 

 

 Address(es):
 245 Walworth Road, Walworth, LONDON, SE17 1RL, England
 

 

 Firm ID:
 425922
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.



 
Decision details



Mr Obioha practising certificate for 2025/2026 is subject to the following conditions:

Edward Obioha is not a manager or owner of any authorised body.

Subject to condition one, Edward Obioha may act as a solicitor, only as an employee where the role has first been approved by us.

In these conditions the terms are as defined in the SRA Glossary.

 
Reasons/basis



The above conditions are necessary in the public interest. They are reasonable and proportionate having regard to the purposes set out in regulation 7 of the SRA Authorisation of Individuals Regulations, and the regulatory objectives and principles governing regulatory activities as contained in section 28 of the Legal Services Act 2007
